Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...Maybe this is what they call divine guidance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The detective called me this morning and said he found my wife and son.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}He said they're runnin' a small restaurant. It sounds like it's pretty popular among the locals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}My son's married, and his wife is pregnant... Sure makes me feel old...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I ain't comin' back 'til I earn their forgiveness. So... I'll be outta town for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I decided the next time I saw your face would be the day I leave. So, I'll be goin' tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I'll get down on my knees if I hafta. If my son wants to sock me in the face, well, that's fine too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I-I've been thinkin' about proposing to my wife again... even though I'm not so good with words...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 1 25 25}I'm gonna say, "I wanna recite the sutras with you by my side, for the rest of my life." ...Well? How's that sound?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 17 15 114}You don't know nothin'! She's gonna burst into tears when she hears that! No copyin' it, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Might not mean much comin' from a monk who couldn't relinquish thoughts of the family he lost...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But I was finally able to face the fact that I was drinkin' to hide my true feelings. It was... an enlightenment of sorts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hmph, it's all your fault, kid. After lecturin' you all those nights...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You started remindin' me of my son.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Maybe Buddha sent you to help me... I gotta admit, I believe in fate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}Had I not met you, I don't think I'd ever see my family again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mutatsu thanked me from[n]the bottom of his heart...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we really[n]understand each other now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Tower Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Chi You{f 0 1 27}, the warrior king![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Here, take this... Think of it as a goodbye gift.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. *If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}When you mix Cointreau with white rum and lemon juice, and shake it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You get a cocktail called "XYZ."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Movies and manga often use the initials "XYZ" to symbolize the end of something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 1 25 25}But, I consider XYZ to be the best of the best... It tastes sooo good goin' down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'll be prayin' that your future will be XYZ...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I held the reserve tag tightly[n]and returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
